# newswatch
> RSS news monitoring pipeline — collect, extract, semantic search, change track.
```
pip install newswatch
```
Chains feedkit (RSS) + markgrab (extract) + embgrep (search) + diffgrab (diff). Runs locally, no API keys.
## Key exports
- `NewsPipeline` — async pipeline: setup/run/search/close
- `PipelineResult` — dataclass with counts + errors
## Example
```python
from newswatch.pipeline import NewsPipeline
pipeline = NewsPipeline()
await pipeline.setup(categories=["technology"])
result = await pipeline.run(extract_limit=50)
hits = pipeline.search("transformer architecture")
pipeline.close()
```
## Links
- [Full API](/llms-full.txt) | [Source](https://github.com/QuartzUnit/newswatch) | [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/newswatch/)
